impact: This advances the missing-information recovery path by adding the deterministic four-item fixture needed before the broader validator implementation resumes.
summary: Add a minimal redacted missing-information output fixture with exactly four source-backed requested items.
target_task: Task checkbox-61: Add a minimal missing-information output validation fixture with exactly four requested items: one fact, one file, one acknowledgment, and one decision, each source-backed and redacted.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
